## What are you trying to do?
Describe what you're trying to accomplish with OpenClaw + OpenAdapter.

## Your OpenClaw Setup
- **OpenClaw version:** [e.g. latest, v1.2.3]
- **Messaging platform:** [e.g. WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord]
- **OpenClaw skills/features:** [e.g. home automation, file management]

## Your OpenAdapter Configuration
```yaml
# Paste your OpenClaw config (redact sensitive info)
llm:
  provider: openai
  api_base: "http://127.0.0.1:3000/v1"
  ...
```

## What's Not Working?
Describe the issue or question.

## Error Messages
```
Paste any error messages from OpenClaw or OpenAdapter logs
```

## Have You Checked?
- [ ] OpenAdapter is running (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] Can access `http://127.0.0.1:3000/v1/chat/completions` via curl
- [ ] Read the [OpenClaw Integration Guide](../docs/OPENCLAW_INTEGRATION.md)
- [ ] Checked [OpenClaw Integration Discussions](../../discussions/categories/openclaw-integration)

## Additional Context
Anything else that might help us help you!
